questionHtml:
A pollen tube grows down the style to an egg inside the ovary of a flower. What is the next process that occurs?

A. Dispersal

B. Fertilization

C. Germination

D. Pollination

meta.title: A pollen tube grows down the style to an egg inside the ovary of a flower. What is the next process that occurs? A. Dispersal B. Fertilization C. Germination D. Pollination
breadcrumbLabels: D3.1.8. Sexual reproduction in flowering plants
